title: Cookie Policy
description: How we use cookies and local storage on sunterra.com.au.

hero.title: Cookie Policy
hero.lede: How we use cookies and local storage on sunterra.com.au.

prose: This site uses localStorage for theme preference, quote drafts and lead data — no third-party tracking cookies.
Functional storage only. No advertising cookies. You can clear localStorage via browser settings.
